lines.gurmukhi: ਡਿਗਿ ਨ ਡੋਲੈ ਕਤਹੂ ਨ ਧਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: ddig na ddolai katahoo na dhaavai |
lines.english: No one falls there, or wavers, or goes anywhere.
They obtain a permanent seat in the infinite. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਕੋ ਇਹੁ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur prasaad ko ihu mehal paavai |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, some find this mansion.
They enter the deepest state of Samaadhi, through the kind mercy of God. ||3||
He has no end or limitation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮ ਭੈ ਮੋਹ ਨ ਮਾਇਆ ਜਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: bhram bhai moh na maaeaa jaal |
lines.english: They are not touched by doubt, fear, attachment or the traps of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੁਆਦੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai antar har har suaad |
lines.english: One who enjoys the taste of the Lord, Har, Har, deep within himself,
He Himself is unmanifest, and He Himself is manifest.
O Nanak, his wondrous state cannot be described. ||4||9||20||
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:
In the Sangat, my mind has found contentment.
Meeting with the Sangat, the Congregation, the Supreme Lord God has come into my consciousness.
Countless times, I humbly bow to the Saints. ||1||
This mind is a sacrifice to the Saints;
I touch my forehead to the feet of the Saints.
Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of the Saints' Darshan, I live.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਓਟ ਗਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਰਾਖੇ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee ott gahee sukh paaeaa raakhe kirapaa dhaaree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: holding tight to their support, I have found peace, and in their mercy, they have protected me. ||1||Pause||
I wash the feet of the Saints, and drink in that water.
The Saints have covered my faults.
The Saints are my immaculate wealth. ||2||
My mind rests its hopes in the Saints.
The Merciful Lord has blessed me with the Saints' Congregation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ਮੋਹਿ ਕਬਹੂ ਨ ਕੜਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: sant prasaad mohi kabahoo na karradaa |
lines.english: By the Grace of the Saints, I am no longer tormented.
The Compassionate Saints have become my help and support. ||3||
My consciousness, intellect and wisdom have been enlightened.
He cherishes all beings and creatures.
The Lord is profound, unfathomable, infinite, the treasure of virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੈ ਕਾਜਿ ਨ ਗ੍ਰਿਹੁ ਰਾਜੁ ਮਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: terai kaaj na grihu raaj maal |
lines.english: Your home, power and wealth will be of no use to you.
Your corrupt worldly entanglements will be of no use to you.
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:
Nanak is enraptured, seeing the Saints. ||4||10||21||
Know that all your dear friends are fake.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਲੇ ਮੀਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਤੇਰੀ ਲਾਜ ਰਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam gun gaae le meetaa har simarat teree laaj rahai |
lines.english: Sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord's Name, O friend; remembering the Lord in meditation, your honor shall be saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਤੇਰੈ ਚਲੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har har naam sang terai chalai |1|
lines.english: Only the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, will go along with you. ||1||
Without the Lord, all pursuits are useless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਜਮੁ ਕਛੁ ਨ ਕਹੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har simarat jam kachh na kahai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Remembering the Lord in meditation, the Messenger of Death will not touch you. ||1||Pause||
Here and hereafter, your face shall be radiant and bright. ||2||
Gold, silver and wealth are just dust.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਜਾਪਿ ਮਨ ਸੁਖਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad jaap man sukhaa |
lines.english: Chanting the Word of the Guru's Shabad, your mind shall be at peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਨ ਹੀ ਨ ਕੀਏ ਕਾਜ ਮਾਇਆ ਪੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kin hee na kee kaaj maaeaa poore |
lines.english: None of them ever accomplished the tasks of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੈ ਜਨੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japai jan koe |
lines.english: Any humble being who chants the Name of the Lord, Har, Har,
Even the greatest of the great worked and worked until they were exhausted.
The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is the anchor and support of the Lord's devotees.
will have all his hopes fulfilled. ||3||
The Saints are victorious in this priceless human life.
Slave Nanak is a sacrifice to him. ||4||11||22||
Whatever the Lord's Saint does, is approved and accepted.
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:
It is of no use to you; it was meant for others.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਕੀ ਜੇਵੜੀ ਤੂ ਆਗੈ ਬੰਧ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jam kee jevarree too aagai bandh |1|
lines.english: In the world hereafter, you shall be tied to the leash of the Messenger of Death. ||1||
You practice egotism, and act like a blind man.
You gather wealth by exploiting people.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਕੇ ਮਾਤੇ ਤੈ ਉਠਿ ਚਲਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa ke maate tai utth chalanaa |
lines.english: You are intoxicated with Maya, but you must soon arise and depart.
Give up your envy of others, you fool!
You only live here for a night, you fool!
In the fullness of youth, he is involved in foul-smelling sins.
In his childhood, the child is blind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਚਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਤੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੁਪਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raach rahio too sang supanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You are totally involved in the dream. ||1||Pause||
